hextechBurnPower.title: Burn
HEXTECH_BURN_POWER.title: Burn

HEXTECH_BURN_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of this creature's turn, lose [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of its current HP, with a minimum of [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP. Then Burn is reduced by [blue]10%[/blue].
